publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-01-07 23:24:49 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Weston Milliken is a philantropist. The Weston Milliken papers document Milliken's grantmaking, organizing and activism.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The Weston Milliken papers document Milliken's grantmaking, organizing and activism. His papers include MAP and NQAPIA reports and conference programs, grant material from Queer Youth Fund, Kicking Assets Fund, The Freeman Foundation and ADaM, articles and clippings, ephemera, The Personage newsletters, material on Creating Change and Funding Forward (National LGBTQ Task Force) and general material on LGBT.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Weston Milliken papers, #7899. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to Tides correspondence with Queer Youth Fund in Box 1 (folders 1-4) until January 1, 2030.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to Kicking Assets Fund material in Box 8 until December 31, 2024.

controlaccess.subject: Philanthropy
Gays.
controlaccess.corpname: National Queer Asian Pacific Islander Alliance
National Gay and Lesbian Task Force (U.S.).--Creating Change Conference.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Tides Records (QYF was at Tides Foundation for first year before moving to Liberty Hill Foundation)

did.unittitle: Tides Foundation/Liberty Hill Initial Fund Set Up and miscellany
Tides Foundation letters of intent and request for proposals
Queer Youth Fund letters of intent

Queer Youth Fund letters of intent

Queer Youth Fund letters of intent
Queer Youth Fund letters of intent
Queer Youth Fund proposals and letters of intent
Queer Youth Fund letters of intent
Queer Youth Fund letters of intent
Queer Youth Fund proposals and letters of intent

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: MOU's, potential partner correspondence, LHF invoices and payments, pledges, outgiving for Queer Youth Fund - DA Statements.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: MOU's, potential partner correspondence, LHF invoices and payments, pledges, outgiving for Queer Youth Fund - DA Statements.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes description of history with Queer Youth Fund by Milliken.

did.unittitle: Brainstorming exercise that let to Queer Youth Fund

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes description by Milliken and correspondence.

did.unittitle: Final summary report of all grants, by Milliken
Outgiving for Queer Youth Fund and final accounting correspondence
Series II. Kicking Assets Fund at Tides Foundation
National Gay and Lesbian Task Force "Queer the Census" ephemera sent with application
Trust agreement establishing the Freeman Foundation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence relates to a grant to Yale in honor of John Boswell's service to the foundation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: ADaM is a funding circle of Ralph Alpert (Santa Cruz), Mike Dively (Winter Park, FL) and Weston Milliken. We made a number of small and large grants over the years. This grew out of a men's group we participated in with others called ARF.

did.unittitle: Small grant II - Fringe Benefits Theatre
Small grant I - WFM (Milliken) general correspondence
FGLI (Funders for Lesbian and Gay Issues) multi-year grants
Series V. The Parsonage, San Francisco

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters 1983‐90, various minutes and correspondence, Parsonage Report on Commission on Liturgical Renewal ('84‐'85), Copy of SF Examiner "Gay In America" special section 1989. Also Hope & Help Center newsletters (H&H was an Espicopal SF AIDS ministry)

did.unittitle: Parsonage Report on Commission on Liturgical Renewal
Series VI. The Movement Advancement Project (MAP) and National Queer Asian Pacific Islander Alliance (NQAPIA)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Movement Advancement Project (MAP) ‐ print outs of their public facing reports. I served on the MAP Board. National Queer Asian & Pacific Islander Alliance (NQAPIA) ‐ conference programs and misc. I supported them with personal grants.

did.unittitle: Brad, Ben, and Ange-Marie, Southern California grantmakers
Collection of obituaries and articles about Roger Milliken
The GSP Airport Commission remembers Roger Milliken
San Francisco Gay in America newspapers

Funders for LGBTQ Issues tracking report

Funders for LGBTQ Issues tracking report

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The t-shirts have a written description by Milliken.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 665 is a BDSM supply store in West Hollywood, California.
